message:
feat(ffs-core): integrate MVCC store into OpenFs with full transaction API

Wire the MvccStore into OpenFs behind an Arc<RwLock<parking_lot>> so all
snapshots and transactions share a single version store. This adds the
core transactional surface:

- begin_transaction / commit_transaction (FCW semantics)
- commit_transaction_ssi (Serializable Snapshot Isolation with
  rw-antidependency tracking for write-skew prevention)
- read_block_at_snapshot: MVCC-aware reads that check versioned store
  before falling back to the underlying device
- stage_block_write / record_read: staging and SSI read-set tracking
- prune_mvcc_versions: periodic GC of superseded versions
- latest_block_version: query helper for SSI callers

All operations are instrumented with structured tracing at appropriate
levels (trace for hot-path reads, debug for txn lifecycle, info for
commits, warn for conflicts).

Also updates .beads/issues.jsonl with current issue status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
